entry.title: Re: CK40N CK24 CK11N COSTING RUN
entry.content:
Just to add costing run cannot be done weekly - it should be miniimum periodically (monthly) - if you try to do Ck11n when released cost estimate already there for period in material master you will get error like released cost estimate for period already exists.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: On Uploading PDF or PPt File Getting 403 Error Forbidden
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am facing a Strange problem with my SAP UI5 Application, when i am uploading PDF or PPT file its failing with 403 Forbidden error at browser level in quality and production. in development system its working fine.

the request is not even reacing to gateway system that i could analyze the error.

Kindly share your comments.

Thanks

SAPUI5  SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Re: Custom formula shows N/A in the form
entry.content: This is exactly right. There is no "else" condition in your last if.

entry.title: Re: Where is the "follow user" option in the new Community?
entry.content:
Hi @kirankumar440 ,

a) this depends on your OS and the RSS reader of choice... I suggest looking at open source RRS readers or alternatives, that fit your need and see on how to configure them, but this should be quite easy

b) if you use the respective link (as in pic 5) you'll get all the posts from the respective user (just verified this looking at my feeds)

entry.title: Re: iOS build fails
entry.content:
Well, that's the original topic of this thread.

According to @MaiaraEllwanger, we're awaiting feedback from SAP developers already working on the issue for over a month now...

entry.title: Re: How to call RAP static action from elements FPM exten...
entry.content:
We solved it with the following coding:

// Get controlId from table annotations
const oViewContent =  this.getEditFlow().getView().getAggregation("content");
const oTableDefinition = oViewContent[0].getAggregation("content").getTableDefinition()
const sControlId = oTableDefinition.annotation.id;  // "fe::table::ZBC_C_ACI_WHITELIST::LineItem"

this.editFlow.invokeAction("com.sap.gateway.srvd.zbc_aci_whitelist_srv.v0001.deleteAll()", {    
    //contexts: aSelectedContexts[0], - not needed for static action
    //model: oDataModel, - not needed for static action
    controlId: sControlId, // needed for static action
    bStaticAction: true // needed for static action
}).then(function () {
    MessageToast.show(oResourceBundle.getText("tableContentDeleted"));
    this.refresh();         // Refresh table
}.bind(this));

Found it with debugging a standard elements action call for the same static action. This is not in the documentation (API Reference - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK (ondemand.com)) and might change in future! Currently we are using UI5 version 1.120.x

entry.title: Add React app to SAP Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have a multitenant application, deployed on a provider subaccount. Also, we have a consumer with SAP Build WorkZone, where we have added a new application using a URL. This URL is pointing to a React application (Deployed within mtx application).

The used URL, is the URL of our consumer + URI of react app. For instance, https://consumer*.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/react_app/index.html.

So, in theroy, when accesing through the Build WorkZone site, we should be able to access the react app (With the proper authoritzation headers). 

This is not working always fine. Sometimes, when WorkZone load index.html from the URL, we are getting the following error:

Funny thing is that if we open "Development Tools" on Chrome, and we try to access the app again, we see that WorkZone is calling the location URL.

Also works, if we access an UI5 application (Also part of mtx application) before, and then access the react application. Becasue WorkZone is doing the same as above image.

Any idea why this is happening? Thanks in advance.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
Great blog @kenneth_dalvik !

Since SAP DataSphere is a cloud solution, how can this be dealt in big organizations that will not adopt any cloud solutions for security and resilient reasons?  Is there any DataSphere on-premise solutions possible?  Today's world faces, a multitude of challenges (conflicts, climate, hacks, etc...) so internet connection may become an issue, and maybe not be continuously available, especially for cloud solutions.  How SAP is dealing with this?

entry.title: Re: SAC BW live connection: Error Illegal State: data are...
entry.content: Due to https://me.sap.com/notes/2888562 there was a feature delivery last weekend. Systeminfo shows also built date of April 18th. We are also on public cloud.

entry.title: Re: Extending Electronic Outgoing Invoices for Government Tracking using In-App Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi Stefan

interesting blog. we tried to use it and other sample code but nothing happen in changing structure.

Are any prerequisite required to correctlky fill in changing structure?

 

KR

Marko

entry.title: Own reference number in DFKKKO-XBLNR for certain FI-CA postings, like reset clearing documents
entry.content:
Hello!

We need an advice on how to find the best solution for the tracking of reset clearing documents. We want to fill the reference field in DFKKKO-XBLNR with an own value.

Thanks and regards!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Own reference number in DFKKKO-XBLNR for certain FI-C...
entry.content:
Hello!

For your requirement, I recommend you to consider the FI-CA event 0061. In this event, you have the chance to influence the reference number in the document header (DFKKKO-XBLNR). Please note that this option is not available in all FI-CA processes.

Best regards,
Ronny

entry.title: Re: Embed mode not working for optimized story
entry.content:
Dear @anthonysc,

you can use script in the onInit() function of your story to reload it in mode embed

if (Application.getMode() !== ApplicationMode.Embed){
NavigationUtils.openApplication(Application.getInfo().id, UrlParameter.create("mode", "embed"), false);
}

I hope this helps.

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: Create Adobe form with fragments as a copy of the standard.
entry.content:
@Kriti

It's unusual for the display view to be totally blank if there is a valid element hierarchy.

Things to check:

LiveCycle is V11.

Warnings/Log window - display and check for exceptions.

XML view - does the XML look correct (this is a bit of reach, as it is hard to decode!) 

Does anything show on master page screen? If no master page, there is nothing to render the form to.

entry.title: Re: Cannot create draft for Node.js CAP Service in custom...
entry.content:
Hi,

I see that you have resolved the problem in your code.
I've reviewed your approach, and it seems to be aligned with what I've implemented in my project. However, I'm encountering an unexpected behavior when executing the DUPLICATE action in my TypeScript-based project.

Here's a breakdown of my code:
In OutletsController.ts, I have a method for handling outlet duplication:

public async duplicateOutlet(req: Request): Promise<any> {
try {
let selectedItemID: string;
const firstParam = req.params[0] as { ID: string };
console.log('firstParam:', firstParam.ID);

selectedItemID = firstParam.ID;

const { Outlets } = cds.entities(Constants.CDS_NAMESPACE);
const sQuery = SELECT.from(Outlets).where`(ID) = ${selectedItemID}`;
let selectedItem = await cds.run(sQuery);
console.log('selectedItem:', selectedItem);

// Setting IsActiveEntity to true (unexpected behavior)
selectedItem[0].IsActiveEntity = true;
const newItemData = { ...selectedItem[0] };
delete newItemData.ID;
console.log('newItemData: ',newItemData);

const insertedItem = await INSERT.into(Outlets).entries(newItemData);
console.log(insertedItem);
return insertedItem;
} catch (error) {
console.error('Error duplicating outlet:', error);
throw error;
}
}
In service.cds, I've defined the Outlets entity with the DUPLICATE action:
service.cds

@odata.draft.enabled
entity Outlets as select ID, code @mandatory, description from planification.Outlets actions {
action DUPLICATE() returns Outlets;
}

In service.ts, I'm binding the DUPLICATE action to the duplicateOutlet method in my controller:
this.on(
"DUPLICATE",
this.outletsController.duplicateOutlet.bind(this.outletsController)
);

Despite following similar patterns to your solution, I'm facing issues where the IsActiveEntity field is unexpectedly set to true after executing the DUPLICATE action.
Your guidance on resolving this unexpected behavior would be greatly appreciated.

Youssef.

entry.title: To get records for last 120days(4 Moths) in BODS
entry.content:
Hi All

Need to see records for last 4 Months(120 Days) , this condition I need to apply in query transformation where clause in Designer based on a Date field-ERDAT which contains values in format: yyyy.mm.dd 

Please anyone assist me on this .

Regards,

Siba

entry.title: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device
entry.content:
Hi,

 

we were following a set of blogs and tutorials like:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/enhancing-s-4hana-with-sap-hana-cloud-vector-store-and-genai/ba-p/13655191

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/ai-core-genai-hana-vector.html

 

We need to use the features in a cloud foundry python app. Unfortunately the installation of

package 

sentence-transformers (as part of the requirements.txt file) always leads to a "no space left on device" error during build.
The memory limit is set to 8G, the disk space to 10G in the manifest.yml.
 
How can we solve this issue in the SAP BTP cloud foundry environment ?
 
Any help is highly appreciated.
 
Regards
Marcus

entry.title: Re: Embed mode not working for optimized story
entry.content:
Dear Susanne,

thanks for your answer.

It works but it reload twice the story wihich is not acceptable for users.

I don't understand why the parameter is not taken into account.

Best regards

entry.title: Proactive Order (YA02) is not generating with Notifiction type (Y2) and giving error while schedulin
entry.content:
Hello All,

Proactive Order (YA02) is not generating with Notification type (Y2) and giving error while scheduling from Maintenance Plan. Client do not want to generate Notification as call object. Requirement is to generate Order as call object. While generating it is giving APRQ error. Process is working fine if we are generating notification first and creating order manually. Is it possible to generate order and skip the approval part for notification or we can do auto approval while creation. Kindly suggest.

Regards

Yogesh Sharma

entry.title: TRM Treasury: Movement interest expense (gross) with MZWST X "Calculate tax" to FI
entry.content:
In Treasury and Risk Management (TRM), there is a financial transaction in which the interest expense is taxed. The bank also creates an invoice for this with the net interest expense and the VAT amount on the interest expense. There are therefore 2 flows in TRM.

Actually, both transactions should now be posted in FI (transaction TBB1).

Our aim is that two flows (interest expense and tax) are shown in the cash flow in Treasury, but only one gross interest expense is sent to Accounting, so that only one document is created in Accounting and both accounts (interest expense, tax) are shown in one posting record based on the gross amount.

With the badi TPM_ACCIF_TRAC it is not possible to manipulate the amount transferred to FI.

An additional derived flow could perhaps be used to solve this (the actual interest flow is not sent to FI, only the derived flow, which is increased by the tax amount) - however, this derived flow is also mapped in the cash flow.
What other options are there to ensure that a posting record comes out in FI at the end: 40: Interest expense, 40 Tax ; 50 Treasury clearing account.

entry.title: Re: SO Billing + Real Internal Order Flow data to CO-PA
entry.content:
Check SAP note 729381 - When should a profitability segment be determined point 8, if you would really like to flow data to PA remove IO, let say with enhancement you are able to post to PA even when real IO present then that IO having no usuage as in IO report no postings will be available like in case of statistical order as data can be posted to only one real cost object.

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

My name is Sumit and I am from India. At this moment, This course will help me out to enhance my overall knowledge.
SAP brings to the table as it's evident that we are highly skillful but because of economic crisis we aren't able to take advantage of many opportunities. Kinldy consider me in this kind great initiative of providing free certification.

I'm following under below categories:

- People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I already completed SAP Learning Journey's as below 

1. Discover Organizational Change Management for SAP Cloud Projects.

2.Exploring SAP Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Deployment Error with 'destination' Variable in PRD Environment
entry.content:
I have received the response from SAP as follows.

I have checked with my colleagues and found the following Note on this topic:

3394899 - SAP Build Process Automation - Availability of Environments

As can be seen, "destination" variables are not allowed in shared environments currently.

Please see the roadmap for the upcoming changes to shared environments:

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?range=CURRENT-LAST&PRODUCT=73554900100800003832#Q1%202024

entry.title: Re: Objects and attachments: WF USER DECISION STEP: Calling BDC on clicking the link
entry.content: Please do not post a question about SAP Web sites (community, etc.) if it's not a question about SAP Web sites! You can use Technology Q&A or any groups.

entry.title: Re: Has the SAP Master Data Integration service been depr...
entry.content:
Dear Mustafa, 

SAP Master Data Integration service (MDI) is not deprecated. There is currently a rework ongoing on the licence model, which has the impact, that MDI cannot be licensed with a CPEA license for new customers any more. The new license model is not yet released. 

However, for existing customer, still CPEA license model is valid and MDI can be fully utilized.

Also, we do further invest and enhance our service. If you are interested in the roadmap of MDI, please have a look the SAP Road Map Explorer. There will be more items published in the coming days.

Best regards,

Michael, MDI Product Management Team

entry.title: Re: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device
entry.content:
Sometimes staging requires more disk space.  If you vendor your requirements, there would be no need for this.  Make sure to target platform as cflinuxfs4(Ubuntu 22.04). 

See a similar issue: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/could-not-install-packages-due-to-an-environmenterror-errno-28-no-space/qaq-p/12120166

entry.title: Re: SAC BW live connection: Error Illegal State: data are...
entry.content: Yes, We have the same built date...If I find something I'll update here, if you know of any workaround to fix it let me know also thanks a lot.

entry.title: Change default date format for a language in SAP BTP Workzone
entry.content:
HI,

Is there a way to change the default date format for a language from say MM.DD.yyyy to DD.MM.yyyy in sap BTP Workzone. Right now every language has a default date format. For example for German it is DD.MM.yyyy and I want to change it to MM.DD.yyyy.

Is there a way to do it. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Services for object inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using the 'Services for object' box that is displayed in every document once activated using the PID SD_SWU_ACTIVE (including PRs in ME52N/ME353N, POs in ME22N/ME23N and Inbound deliveries in VL32N/VL33N, though the description of the PID is talking of workflow box activation in VA02 and VA03).

The 'Relationships' menu gives direct access to IDocs received or sent for the document.

That's easier and quicker than going to the outputs for the doc., copy the IDoc number in the processing log for an output and paste it then in WE02 to display it.

However, the relationships menu in the box remains empty for an inbound delivery, even if an output was processed fr it and an IDoc sent.

Anyone has an idea if I miss anything?

BR

Yan

entry.title: Smartforms assigned to technician cannot be edited by a service leader
entry.content:
Hi!

I have a question regarding editing smartforms that are assigned to a different user.

Use case is that technician A has an activity with smartform assigned. After performing their tasks in the smartform, there is techician B (serivce leader) adding some information in the same smartform.

It seems that this is not possible without assigning the smartform to technician B even though the relevant admin policy group says ChecklistInstance Upddate = ALL.
Is this assumption correct and if so, has this recently changed?

Thanks!
Christian

entry.title: Aggregate Constraints Time Level vs Optimizer Run Time Level
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I have a question regarding aggregate constraints and the time level at which the is optimizer run. 

We have defined the aggregate constraints (Minimum and Maximum Aggregate Production Capacity Usage) at Calendar Week level and the optimizer runs at Technical Weeks. 

We see that for full calendar weeks the quantity is split equally across all the days in the week but with split calendar weeks (TWa - 5 days and TWb 2 days) we see that quantity gets disaggregated to the TW with the most days in it (TWa). 

When running the optimizer at Calender Week all is fine. We assume that it is possible to model this in this way given the documentation;

Please see the following as an example

 

  • 29-Apr-24 is a split calendar week

As you can see the 500 is disaggregated to the days in TW32b and not in TW32a

We’ve changed the disaggregation mode for the Capacity Demand and Usage of Production Resource KFs to be equal distribution and use the WEEKWEIGHT attribute as a Period Weight factor.

I would appreciate any guidance on how we can overcome this. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Custom formula shows N/A in the form
entry.content: It works! Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Difference between Last quarter and last fiscal quarter
entry.content:
Hi 

What is the structure of your fiscal year variant assigned to ledger 2L? Depending on the same, the data would be shown under fiscal year variant.

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: Difference between Last quarter and last fiscal quarter
entry.content:
Hi Sanil Bhandari,

For 2L it is S6, but we have the same situation for other ledgers where K4 is assigned.

Regards,

Kamil

entry.title: SPRO configuration to track changes to Batch master field MCHA-SGT_SCAT(stock segment)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I seek your guidance on whether there is an SAP standard SPRO configuration available to track changes to the MCHA-SGT_SCAT field (stock segment) in the Batch master. If such a provision does not exist in the standard SAP configuration, could you please suggest alternative options to track changes to this field?

The goal is to be able to view the changes in the MSC4N transaction.

I appreciate your prompt response.

Thank you,

Ravi K

entry.title: Post payload to CPI iFlow from UI5 - Internal Server Error
entry.content:
I need to send a JSON payload to an iFlow, in Postman the request is successful (with OAuth2 token retrieval and csrf in header), but the response in UI is Internal Server Error (the iFlow is also expecting JSON).

  • I am getting csrf token from GET request to CPI instance and pass it in the following POST request to CPI endpoint :

 

  • The destination configuration is the following and added in xs-app.json : 

     

Also curl -v -i cpi.dest returns 500

* Cpi destination and UI5 app are in different subaccounts.

- What could be the cause of this?

entry.title: Re: For SAP Data Archiving, if I want to implement SAP IL...
entry.content:
Hello,
Yes, no additional 3rd Party Solution is needed when you are implementing ILM with SAP IQ.
See the Blog - SAP ILM based on SAP IQ Database

best regards Roland
#sapfirstguidance @RolandKramer

entry.title: Which is the new version or alternative of C_GRCAC certification?
entry.content:
Hello SAP learning Community,

My colleague is an SAP Security consultant wants to peruse certification on Security but when checked certificate recommendation via:  SAP Certification Recommendation
==========================
C_GRCAC SAP Certified Application Associate – SAP Access Control 12.0 Already retired* No recommendation*
=================================
The C_GRCAC is retired and there are no recommendations for it.
So, what will be the next path for the Security Consultants in certificate perspective?
Please recommend.

Thanks and regards,
Revanth Kanteerava

entry.title: Re: Which is the new version of C_HCADM_05 certification?
entry.content:

Sure ,I have posted new question : https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/which-is-the-new-version-or-alternative-of-c-grcac-certification/qaq-p/13680691
Thanks and Regards,
Revanth

entry.title: Re: GroupBy CDS annotation is not working
entry.content:
@PhilippeLefebvr 

If you're using OData V4, try adding a UI.SelectionPresentationVariant that points to the UI.PresentationVariant.

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/49a6ba5b8d6946208322a9f7e16837c2

entry.title: Kit to stock in EWM with production order,but not create inbound delivery and outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi experts,

     I refer to an article to do kit to stock with production order, but the inbound delivery and outbound delivery are not creates. I have assigned the customer,supplier and other information for the plant and warehouse number. Eventhough the status of production order has been changed to LFAN, but no delivery is created. I don't  know what's the problem. thanks!

entry.title: Re: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device

We get one step further but now we see 7.50 MiB / 2.73 GiB [>-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------] 0.27%Error unmarshalling the following into a cloud controller error: <html> <head><title>413 Request Entity Too Large</title></head> <body> <center><h1>413 Request Entity Too Large</h1></center> <hr><center>nginx</center> </body> </html>

entry.title: Re: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device
entry.content: How could this be solved ?

entry.title: Control cycle for EWM IM managed slocs
entry.content:
Hi All,

we are using S4 HANA Embedded 2023,I am staging for PSA source location is EWM managed and destination PSA is IM managed what are the settings I need to do for control cycle and what is a staging indicator.

Request  to share the end to end process.

Kindly share any blogs if you have any, appreciate your help.

Regards,

Chand

entry.title: Re: Enhancement in CO11n
entry.content:
Hello

If you want to post byproduct to stock, it must be inside your BOM with negative quantity.

If you want to post main material both as goods receipt 101 and 531, you could try and it in the BOM, but I don't think that would work well, cause in the end you will have the total quantity in stock, just through different goods movements.

Scrap movement is 551 - it scraps stock quantity of a batch, i.e. gets rid of it. In the end, if you consume (GI) the proportional quantity of componented for producing 100 and post GR of 80 the outcome will be the same.

531 is byproduct and it posts quantities of a material which isn't in the header of an order. 

Hope this helps clarify and lead to a best solution.

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Vilnius 2024 on April 27
entry.content:
Thanks @seVladimirs 

I saw it on LinkedIn already 🙂

entry.title: Re: Deployment Error with 'destination' Variable in PRD E...

entry.title: Cap list output from query not working
entry.content:
I have 2 CDS entities - one points to DB table and another to internet http api.

I have created a readonly CDs entity #3 with combined fields from the 2 entities.

I have also created a list page based on the entity 3. 

I have implemented custom handler on READ after for entity 3 - where I am combining records from 2 sources and sending it back as result.

It is working from odata - I am able to see combined records.

But - in the list page - i dont see the records.

What could be the issue ?

entry.title: Re: 0FI_ACDOCA_10 and 0FI_ACDOCA_20 - Plan Data
entry.content:
Hi,

Please share your solution to bring data from ACDOCP.

Thanks.

Deepak

entry.title: Tables on purchase invoice
entry.content:
Hi All,

When I record an invoice, I notice that data is written to all tables except OPCH, PCH1, PCH6, and PCH12. Are there any other tables I should be checking?

thanks all for your support,

entry.title: Re: fuzzy search with multiple name fields
entry.content: Koen, I would suggest adding `ABAP` to SAP Managed Tags in your question to make it better discoverable with the ABAP audience.

entry.title: SAP OEE Dashboard Error: Customization value and name by work unit could not be found
entry.content:
When attempting to access the OEE Dashboard page, an error message appears stating:

Error 1 :  “Work unit not assigned; contact system administrator”

Error 2 : “Customization value by work unit and customization name could not be found; check log for details”

 

getting error response form api: DataAccessServlet/GetPHNodesForUserInput

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content:
Ok, I've copied the objects from a system that have ABAP2XLSX already installed.

But I'm having problems activating the solution.

Some of them:

- Need to add type ABAP in some clases in Type groups.
- Data element sysuuid_x16 doesn't exists in my version, changed by XSDUUID_RAW

- Some syntax error for this words in some classes declarations: RISK LEVEL HARMLESS
DURATION SHORT.

- Some "new" syntax in class ZCL_EXCEL_WORKSHEET , I had to change the code to not do math operations or call methods in the call to other methods.

 

These problems are now fixed. but...

 


-  now, my big problem: Class CL_ABAP_UNIT_ASSERT doesnt exist... i've tried to copy it to a Z one, but there are references to other classes and interfaces like: if_Aunit_Object, cl_Aunit_Failure_Assert_C...
I'm going to try to install SABP_UNIT_CORE and SABP_UNIT_CORE_API packages from some SAP notes... If you have a clue how to do it...


Thanks in advance

entry.title: 261 Consumption in WM
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am doing 261 consumption in wm with process order through MIGO material have control cycle sometimes the consumption happening from PSA Storage bin. But same material sometimes it is reducing stock from 914 even that material have control cycle and stock in PSA Storage Bin. Any Solution for this or reason why it happens like this. It should always reduce stock from PSA Bin but why it is reducing from 914.

Thanks

LE Warehouse Management

#

entry.title: Re: 0FI_ACDOCA_10 and 0FI_ACDOCA_20 - Plan Data

entry.title: Re: Functional Area in Customer Project
entry.content:
Hi
The link provided above is not working, you please share new link.
" The functional aera for customer projects will be YB25 which is default and delivered by SAP. We don't need to assign this anywhere in config."
Is my understanding correct.

Thanks and Regards
Vasanth

entry.title: Re: Functional Area in Customer Project
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: Re: Tables on purchase invoice
entry.content:
Hi,

OPCH and PCH1 are the tables which are main tables and each record of the AP Invoice should go into the OPCH table and line details in the PCH1.

Check what query are you using to check records in the MSSQL/HANA? May be you can share the same here.

Also, is this happening with specific document or all documents have the same issue?

If you use the document number, in the SAP Business One application, are you able to find the Invoice?

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Proration of flat rate
entry.content:
Hello @katrin_frenzel ,

I have checked the Schema as you advised. This factor operand is used only once in the entire Schema to calculate the amount using LUMSUM01. 

Factor operand - M_ADT_CW

Price operand - L_ADT_CW (flat rate)

When you are saying it could a Schema setup issue, what exactly should I check? Sorry, but I'm not getting that.

entry.title: Re: fuzzy search with multiple name fields
entry.content: I.e. if you run it without "or" it works?

entry.title: Re: KO88 settlement of work orders: order missing in FI d...
entry.content:
The reason why order number is not transferred in FI document is due to the incorrect customizing maintained for the field AUFNR in "field transfer for real time integration CO->FI". Fields are transferred according to the customizing for the field transfer settings for the real time integration

--Solution--

If a certain account assignment object is missing, the relevant field needs to be activated as relevant for the field transfer for FI:

The field transfer maintenance can be reached with the following customizing path: 

SPRO: IMG -> Financial Accounting (New) -> Financial Accounting Global Settings (New) -> Ledgers -> Real-Time Integration of Controlling with Financial Accounting -> Define Field Transfers for Real-Time Integration

Alternatively, you may also use the transaction FAGLCOFIIMG to reach the real time integration customizing area and to access the field transfer from this area menu.

Refer KBA 3457723

entry.title: Equipment/Functional location Manufacturer Serial number --> Order --> PR
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Equipment/Functional location has manufacturer serial number. Maintenance order is created for the equipment/Functional location with spare parts. Dependent requirement was generated against the order for all spare parts. After MRP run, Purchase Requisition was generated for spares.

In Purchase Requisition, we need to map the equipment/Functional location manufacturer serial number.

Business process:

Vendor will see the manufacturer serial number in the PR and provide the exact spare parts based on the manufacturer serial number.

Is there any way to flow the equipment/functional location manufacturer serial number to PR?

entry.title: Advanced Shipping and Receiving Simplifying the Connectivity
entry.content:
Advanced Shipping and Receiving, this functionality with SAP S/4HANA simplifies the use of SAP TM with Basic EWM functionality.

As a SAP consultant when we activate the Delivery integration with SAP EWM the Transportation Planning Type determined by the system restricts the system to proceed with Activities such as Loading without Transportation Unit. Till rollout of this functionality if Transportation Unit functionality was not used then we need to use enhancement in the BADI /SCWM/EX_ERP_MAPIN_OD_SAVEREPL to change the ODO Header Transportation Planning Status

Now to enable the system to allow EWM to proceed with the EWM activities without Transportation Unit being sent across from Transportation System i.e. SAP TM. We could use the Freight Order from SAP TM system this functionality is provided by Advance Shipping and Receiving system.

This functionality would require some configuration in the system

  1. Activation of the Shipping Point Location type for ASR

 

  1. Change of the Status Profile on the EWM ODO Type and ITEM Type as the system standard status profile would have Status DTU active which would not allow to proceed with Assignment of TU in EWM.

  • Here we need to De- Activate the Status DTU must be inactive, as EWM directly communicates with SAP TM's freight order object.
  • Status DSH and DTD must be active.

Once this configuration are in place the Outbound Delivery Order would have Transportation Planning Status as F which would allow to Proceed in EWM with TM Freight Order for the Warehouse process

Like Picking, GI ,Loading on the Truck.

Testing Step

  1. Create Sales Order

2. Create Delivery

3. Plan the Delivery in SAP TM

4.Perform the Warehouse Activities like Picking via Warehouse Task, Confirmation of Warehouse Task, Perform GI

5. The Activities such as Setting Execution Status , and PGI can be done via App Load and Unload Freight Orders

 

Conclusion:

  • The freight order can contain both EWM-managed and IM-managed storage locations, for example at a production location, and the two storage locations can share a loading point.

  • The Advanced Shipping and Receiving process is based on the TM freight order and doesn’t use the EWM transportation unit (TU) or the EWM vehicle

entry.title: RAP Node Extensibility for Unmanaged BO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Target System: On Premise, S/4 2023 FPS01

let's assume we have a released, extensible, unmanaged RAP BO like R_SalesOrderTP and would like to extend it for new nodes as mentioned in here: Node Extension - SAP Help.
CDS extension works quite well, but as soon as we try to add Behavior for the newly added Node in the Behavior Extension:

 

extension using interface i_salesordertp
implementation in class zbp_x_ndext_r_salesordertp unique;

extend behavior for SalesOrder
{
  association _myNewNode { create; }
}

define behavior for zr_salesorderndexttp alias MyNewNode
late numbering
( lock, etag, authorization ) dependent by _SalesOrder{
	field ( readonly ) SalesOrder;
}

 

the following error occurs: "unmanged/extension/define behavior" is not supported in this ABAP release. That's quite unfortunate, but i understand that this kind of feature is not supported. Yet?
I do know of the following Feature Matrix where it is mentioned that Node Extensibility is not supported for unmanaged BO. "Enable the original RAP BO for node extensibility" -> even though the Extension on CDS level works quite well and it seems the only missing part is that we are not allowed to add Behavior for new nodes.
Am I right in my assumptions and Is there some kind of roadmap and/or target releases where this feature will be supported?

Thanks in advance for your help and information!

Best,
Michael

entry.title: Re: How to use Digital Manufacturing MDOs within PPD Example: Where-Used Report with Follow-up Actio
entry.content: Great insights, Katja! Thanks for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Problem with ''BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE'' inside LMBGBFSU ( FORM ausgabe )
entry.content:
I found that it happends because of difference between UMLAGERUNG and FW_VERBRAUCH at LMBGBFWA
(Form wa04. )

 

   
   UMBST = UMLAGERUNG.                                          "561708
    UMBST = 0 - UMBST.                                           "561708
    bestd = bestand.
    prdif = verbrauch.
    prdif = prdif - bestd.
    umdif = fw_verbrauch.
    umdif = 0 - umbst - umdif.

 

 After first part of posting the document creates and this block works for BETRAG which lately assigned to FW_VERBRAUCH.
at second part when two documents should be created same block works for UMLAGERUNG.

 

FORM wert_preisproportional USING w-stprs  LIKE mbew-stprs
                                  w-peinh  LIKE mbew-peinh
                                  w-menge  LIKE menge
                                  w-betrag LIKE betrag.

  w-betrag = ( w-menge * w-stprs / 1000 ) / w-peinh.
  IF w-betrag > maximum OR w-betrag < minimum.
    MESSAGE e302 WITH 'WERT_PREISPROPORTIONAL' 'W-BETRAG'.
  ENDIF.

ENDFORM.

 

Here w_betrag becames equal to 8.0039999999999996E+00,

when :
w_menge = 2.0000000000000000E+00
W-STPRS = 40.02
W-PEINH = 1.
1) Why it becames  8.0039999999999996E+00, when it should be  8.0039999999999996E-02,
2) Why after compiling this line result of  w_betrag  at once assigning to BETRAG at first part
and to UMLAGERUNG at second.

entry.title: Re: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device
entry.content: You need to provide some more context to this. When do you get this error? This appears to be unrelated to the original question. So it might be better to pose a new question to get fresh eyeballs to look at it without the cloud of the previous issue.

Vaclav

entry.title: Re: Limiting 1 Completion per Item per Calendar Year
entry.content: Sorry, the restriction applies to registrations (which are class specific) - online items would not be restricted like this to my knowledge.

entry.title: Re: 261 Consumption in WM
entry.content:
Hello @User05 

Check the note 3395575 - During 261 posting the WM transfer requirement (TR) is not created automatically by PP interface

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content: Well... i've commented the lines used in class ZCL_EXCEL to call the class cl_abap_unit_assert... problem solved, now fixing new errors

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA aATP Supply creation-Based Confirmation (SBC) Series Part 4 - Complex Use Case
entry.content:
Dear @kovacsan,
First of all, thank you very much for this elaborative explanation of a very detailed use-case. This advanced form of CTP will be very useful to many SAP customers with PPDS and aATP available.

However, I do have 1 question: would it be possible to trigger a cross-plant check on available capacity in PPDS to suggest a production proposal? Imagine a product can perfectly be produced in 2 sites (in 2 countries). Logically a standard/preferred production site is maintained in the master data. However, if there would be insufficient capacity in that site, could we customize the SBC heuristic that is automatically running in the background to switch the source to an alternative production site as there capacity is available?

Many thanks for your feedback!

Kind regards,
Jens Koyen

entry.title: Re: Post payload to CPI iFlow from UI5 - Internal Server...
entry.content: I'm not sure if this is the issue, additional property HTML5.ForwardToken only makes sense together with No Authentication.

entry.title: Re: Kit to stock in EWM with production order,but not create inbound delivery and outbound delivery
entry.content: I tested it in S4 2022, and the production schedule profile was assigned to production order.thanks

entry.title: Re: Scheduled Report shows successful status; but Mail se...
entry.content:
I think  it's a correct behaviour. The problem is from SendGrid side.BO generated the report and  then SMTP server responsibilities to send the file..it is not delivered  because of SendGrid size restriction. 

You can try with SAP support ticket but more likely you will get the similar response.

entry.title: Re: CF Deployment Error: Error getting tenant t0
entry.content: What is the version of cds and mtx in the installation? Command "cds -v" would tell you the version installed.

entry.title: Umbrella Contract
entry.content:
Hey guys!

Ask me a question, I invoiced an outgoing invoice that has an umbrella contract, but there in accounts receivable, in the content tab, there is the umbrella contract column, but it is blank. I could be wrong, but shouldn't you take the umbrella contract number from the note to accounts receivable?

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX in an old Abap version
entry.content:
Ok, now i think is working...

 

I've fixed some other problems:

class CL_SYSTEM_UUID doesnt exist.

ZCL_EXCEL_COLUMNS
remove - new syntax

ZCL_EXCEL_ROWS
remove - new syntax

ZCL_EXCEL_WRITER_2007 - new syntax:
CREATE_XL_COMMENTS
CREATE_XL_DRAWINGS_HDFT_RELS
CREATE_XL_DRAWINGS_VML_RELS
CREATE_XL_DRAWING_FOR_COMMENTS
CREATE_XL_SHEET
CREATE_XL_WORKBOOK: sysuuid_x16 --> XSDUUID_RAW

ZCL_EXCEL_THEME_FMT_SCHEME
BUILD_XML

entry.title: Re: Moving an S/4 HANA On-Premise system to RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition
entry.content:
Hello Jose M,

We are SAP Partner and we help customer to use SAP product which are integrated with our product.

Few questions about RISE:

1. RISE support various options/areas like below

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • System Hosting Options
  • SAP Business Network
  • SAP BTP Consumption Credits
  • Business Process Automation
  • Embedded Tools and Services
  • Sustainability Solutions

As a partner we need to certify SAP products and in this case SAP S4 HANA with RISE, so being partner do we need to purchase complete RISE subscription or is it ok to host SAP S4 HANA on private cloud(aws) which our company owns? can we purchase SAP manage services to support our aws instance in this case?

entry.title: Re: Proration of flat rate
entry.content:
Hello @diptarkaroy,

I have just tested it out in an internal test system and it works w/o problems.
Schema setup:

All operands are defined with operand access "All operand values".
Factor is prorated in installation facts:

Price is defined as month based and not prorated.
Outcome in billing document:

This is exactly the expected result.

Best regards, Katrin

entry.title: 1H 2024 Product Release - How to copy a role with the latest RBP experience?
entry.content:
Is it still possible to copy a role with the latest RBP experience?

It is not shown under "Actions":

Where did it move to?

entry.title: Re: Equipment/Functional location Manufacturer Serial num...
entry.content:
Hi,

As per my understanding You have the option to add customized field manufacturing serial number in PR, but you can also utilize the material serialized functionality for this purpose. This enables you to automatically generate an equipment master. For further clarification, please refer to the image below.

Serial Profile: OIS2

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2019.001 v1.62 novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Prezados, 

 

Estou com um problema na aplicação da SAP NOTE (a pré-requisito foi aplicada) 

Ao aplicar a nota 3423952 (FI-LOC-LO-BR), não está criando os objetos “DOCU”, destacados em vermelho no print, não permitindo o avanço.

Pelo que percebi a própria nota tem os objetos, mas não está conseguindo criar os mesmos ainda que eu desimplemte e tente reaplicar.

Tentei aplicar as duas notas abaixo, mas não resolveram.

3231660 - SNOTE: Error during Note implementation of DOCU object

3227914 - Revamped SNOTE: Error during Note implementation of DOCU object

 

Alguém ja passou por isso? de toda forma vou reportar um incidente.

Abraço Edu

entry.title: Re: Group valuation in intercompany scenario
entry.content: I know that CKMLCP needs to be executed for all company codes. But then will it not be a data load issue . Please note that my client is on ECC Classic GL

entry.title: Re: International Women’s Day Intro to SAP and your Future Career
entry.content:
Hi @DataTherapist ,

I would like to invite you to this instructor led bootcamp:

SAP S4HANA Public Cloud Bootcamp One Pager Student QR Reg.pdf

Something to think about. It's not for everyone - the time demand and time zone (Eastern Standard US time) may not work for you, so please only apply if it really works for you. You can translate the time to your time zone with this tool: Global Meeting Planner 

Please be sure to register via the PDF is you are interested. Also feel free to pass on to any other aspiring women in Tech 😊

Regards,

David

entry.title: Re: Transport Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 3-System Landscape: From Basics to Comp
entry.content:
I contacted my colleague form the learning department and she sent me the following support link to check the prerequisites

https://support.sap.com/en/offerings-programs/enterprise-support/enterprise-support-academy/learn.html

In the search window, I can enter the course ID "SUP_ELE_0210_2304" and the course is displayed. I am really sorry for the inconvenience!

Regards, Thomas

.

entry.title: Re: GroupBy CDS annotation is not working
entry.content: I am unfortunately using OData V2, so this didn't solve the issue, even after trying

entry.title: Cannot generate a PDF after latest Microsoft Office update
entry.content:
We are not able to generate PDF documents after the latest update for Microsoft 365 Monthly Enterprise subscription (Version 2402 Build 16.0.17328.20282).

The PDF icon appears under the simulation. However, when we open folder, there is no PDF file created.

I have tried the following:

  1. Confirmed that I am able to save a word file as PDF from MS Office.
  2. Performed clean reinstallation of MS Office
  3. Tried generating document on 5 different machines with same results

This was working a month back. As Office is working as intended, rolling back the update is not an option. Also, the Office updates in my organization are automatic and any rollback will be overridden every time I restart the system.

Is there a fix for this issue? Please suggest what should I do next?

entry.title: Re: Transport Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 3-System Landscape: From Basics to Comp
entry.content:
Hello,

Are you still getting the error after the one-time registration? Have you completed your one-time registration for your S-user? Have you received the welcome email to learning hub edition?

https://support.sap.com/en/offerings-programs/enterprise-support/enterprise-support-academy/learn.html

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS classification not recorded at compliance doc...

https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-blogs-by-members/export-license-determination-sap-gts/ba-p/13221863

It might be helpful.

 

Regards, Dean

entry.title: Re: How to deploy SAP Service and Asset Manager metadata definitions to Mobile Services
entry.content:
Hi @vasaviyacham,

Listed errors under "PROBLEMS" tab are related to MDK Validation against the schema. You can safely ignore it if you are using standard metadata. Refer "TERMINAL" tab for deployment failed details.

entry.title: Re: SuperUser SAP B1 HANA 10.0
entry.content: Thanks for the contributions, I have the problem in the following scenario: A user with super user privileges should not run some processes, I should block access to Authorizations for example. Is it possible to block access to a SUPER USER? I understand that for the SAP B1 standard it is not possible, but for HANA? Is there a solution using a store procedure or similar?
